Buildforfun blog posts!

My Biohacking experiment

Achieving my optimal body state

This is based on hunter gathers, reportedly had a BMI of 21-22 [1].

BMI Formula:
BMI = weight / height^2
weight = BMI * height^2
weight = 22 * 1.8^2
weight = 71.28 kg

This means I need to get my weight down to: 71kg. However, 71kg for my body frame is a little too skinny, instead I am going to aim for under 80kg first then reevaluate.

Data plots

Plot of my weight over time:


I have a renpho weighing scale that allows me to export my measurements as a csv. I’ve then made my own chart of my weight using the data.

link to project repo

Citations
[1]https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3405064/
